title: microchilus atalayae
intro: Microchilus atalayae is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane family. It is a perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues. The plant is known to have antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Microchilus atalayae is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a treatment.
